name: Su Casa De Cambio
description_short: MoneyGram agent location offering money transfer, check cashing, and cash services at Su Casa De Cambio in Los Angeles with extended weekday hours.
description_long:
Su Casa De Cambio operates as an authorized MoneyGram agent location in the Boyle Heights area of Los Angeles, California. The business functions as a financial services hub for customers seeking cash-related transactions and money movement services. As a MoneyGram partner, Su Casa De Cambio leverages the global money transfer network to serve its local community with reliable payment and transfer solutions.

The location provides check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment services typical of MoneyGram agent locations. Customers can send and receive money domestically and internationally through MoneyGram's platform, either in person at the physical location or through online channels. The business serves as a cash access point for customers who may not have traditional banking relationships or who prefer in-person service for financial transactions.

Su Casa De Cambio distinguishes itself through extended operating hours, remaining open until 8:00 PM on Friday and offering weekend service on Saturday (8:00 AM - 7:00 PM) and Sunday (9:00 AM - 5:00 PM). The location is accessible by phone at (323) 980-9886 and maintains consistent hours Monday through Thursday (8:00 AM - 7:30 PM). The business requires a valid legal form of ID for cash-related services, reflecting standard compliance procedures for money services.

This is a straightforward MoneyGram agent location serving the East Los Angeles community. While the website provides basic operational information, it does not detail specific fee structures, transfer limits, competitive advantages, or specialized services beyond MoneyGram's standard offerings. The business functions as a convenient cash services outlet for the local area rather than a full-service financial institution.
address: 2132 E Cesar E Chavez Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90033

company_info.headquarters: 2132 E Cesar E Chavez Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90033

pros: Extended Friday hours until 8:00 PM, later than typical check-cashing locations
Weekend service available on Saturday and Sunday
Access to MoneyGram's global money transfer network for domestic and international transfers
Convenient East Los Angeles location at 3594 E 1st Street
Multiple service channels available: in-person and online money management options
Phone accessibility at (323) 980-9886 for customer inquiries
Consistent operating hours Monday-Thursday for regular customer access
cons: Website does not disclose fee structures or pricing for services
No information about transfer limits or daily transaction maximums
Limited details on competitive advantages compared to other MoneyGram agents or check-cashing services
Website content is minimal and hosted entirely on MoneyGram's domain, not an independent business site
No transparency regarding processing times or service turnaround times
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked residents of East Los Angeles needing check cashing services
Customers sending or receiving international money transfers through MoneyGram
People requiring evening or weekend cash services in the Boyle Heights area
diagnosis: Su Casa De Cambio is best for East Los Angeles residents who need convenient check cashing, money orders, or MoneyGram transfers with flexible weekend and extended evening hours. The main caveat is that as a MoneyGram agent location rather than an independent financial services provider, service quality, fees, and options are entirely dependent on MoneyGram's policies and pricing, which are not transparently detailed on their listing.
